commit_scope: Prove API-key and contributor-key mutation auth decisions as a Form-native carrier before mutable front-door route flips.

commands: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/kernel-http.fk form-stdlib/sha256.fk form-stdlib/hex.fk form-stdlib/auth-port.fk form-stdlib/tests/auth-port-band.fk
cd api && python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_native_auth_parity_form.py tests/test_ideas_router_form.py tests/test_spec_registry_router_form.py tests/test_graph_node_mutation_carrier_form.py
cd api && python3 -m ruff check tests/test_native_auth_parity_form.py tests/test_ideas_router_form.py tests/test_spec_registry_router_form.py tests/test_graph_node_mutation_carrier_form.py
local_validation.summary: form/form-stdlib/auth-port.fk now carries the native auth decision shape for mutable routes. It reads X-API-Key from kh-request/kh-header values case-insensitively, allows the configured shared API key, allows active contributor keys by sha256 raw-key hex hash, denies missing/wrong/blank keys with the FastAPI 401 detail, and denies production dev-key misconfiguration with the FastAPI 500 detail. The auth band returned 1111 and includes a Python-known SHA-256 contributor-key fixture.

known_limitations.observed: No POST/PATCH/DELETE /api/ideas or /api/spec-registry route is flipped in this slice.
The carrier proves allow/deny decisions. Updating contributor_api_keys.last_used_at remains part of the live contributor-key table carrier follow-up.
Direct graph_nodes, graph_edges, and graph_node_revisions Postgres writes remain the next blocker before front-door mutation can move.

ci_validation.notes: Pending push of this native auth parity carrier commit and GitHub checks on PR #2586.

deploy_validation.notes: No public deploy attempted for this Form stdlib carrier slice.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Form can now make the same mutation auth allow/deny decisions as FastAPI for shared API keys, active contributor-key hashes, missing/wrong/blank headers, case-insensitive X-API-Key lookup, and production dev-key refusal. Existing public mutation endpoints keep current FastAPI behavior until application graph table writes, revision rows, and edge cleanup are native.
test_flows: cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/kernel-http.fk form-stdlib/sha256.fk form-stdlib/hex.fk form-stdlib/auth-port.fk form-stdlib/tests/auth-port-band.fk -> 1111

cd api && python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_native_auth_parity_form.py tests/test_ideas_router_form.py tests/test_spec_registry_router_form.py tests/test_graph_node_mutation_carrier_form.py -> 18 passed

python3 scripts/validate_spec_quality.py --file specs/native-auth-parity-carrier.md --file specs/ideas-router-form-expression.md --file specs/graph-node-mutation-native-carrier.md --file specs/spec-registry-source-native.md -> OK

phase_gate.reason: Local proof is complete; CI and deployment validation remain pending.
